title: Data Quality Flags and Error Handling
description: Data quality issues must be flagged, logged, and handled according to defined policies. Critical data quality issues must block calculations.

regulatory_basis.rationale: Data accuracy and integrity require systematic data quality management

required_evidence.description: Data quality flags and resolution tracking

acceptance_criteria.description: Data quality flags are logged for all issues

implementation_hints.description: Use structured logging for data quality issues

anti_patterns.alternative: Track and remediate all data quality flags

bob_actions.description: Notify compliance team of critical DQ issues
